paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58 as of July 22, 2026, representing a 1.05 percent decrease from the prior close and a 24.28 percent decrease over the past 21 sessions.
There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights" from PR Newswire, dated July 23, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and other 8-K forms related to the resignation of Miles Everson and the commencement of an offering for the sale of convertible senior notes.
